title: selaginella rupestris var. rupincola
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. rupincola, also known as cliff fern or mountain fern, is a type of spore-producing plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Selaginella rupestris var. rupincola include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, or poultices, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
